infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Dayframe uses location to detect known places and create reviewable activity suggestions.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Dayframe can monitor geofences in the background so place visits become activity events before they become time entries.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Dayframe reads sleep analysis from HealthKit so sleep becomes reviewable activity events.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Dayframe does not write health data, but iOS requires this description when HealthKit capability is enabled.

plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Dayframe reads sleep analysis from HealthKit so sleep becomes reviewable activity events.
plugins.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Dayframe does not write health data, but iOS requires this description when HealthKit capability is enabled.
